display.purpose: Page H1s and hero headlines. Fixed rem per breakpoint, not fluid.

title.purpose: Card and list-item titles; product name.

body.purpose: All prose; capped at 65-75ch inside the 640px column.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Whisper-faint lift under a paper card at rest.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover response for interactive cards; pairs with border -> #dedcd2.

shadows.name: hero
shadows.purpose: The single floating hero element (home analyse input). One per screen.

motion.name: rise
motion.purpose: Cards/rows settling in as data resolves.

motion.name: pulse-dot
motion.purpose: The board's gentle live dot; the only looping motion.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: globals.css zeroes every animation under prefers-reduced-motion. Non-negotiable.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single strongest action on a surface (Analyse, Post).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1A1A18; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 10px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(26,26,24,.85); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid rgba(46,125,82,.4); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: The default control: quiet, hairline-bordered, gets out of the way.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: #fff; color: #1A1A18; border: 1px solid #ECEBE5; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 6px 14px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .2s ease-out, background .2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: rgba(26,26,24,.2); background: #FBFBF8; }

components.name: Natural Tag
components.description: The ONLY meaningful colour in the system. Classification, never a control.
components.css: .ds-tag-natural { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #E7F1EB; color: #2E7D52; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 3px 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Processed Tag
components.description: The amber classification counterpart. Again, only ever a tag.
components.css: .ds-tag-processed { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: #F6ECDD; color: #B5701F; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 3px 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Engagement Pill (Upvote, active)
components.description: Neutral, ink-tinted engagement control -- NEVER green/amber. Active = ink border + ink/5% fill.
components.css: .ds-pill-active { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: rgba(26,26,24,.05); color: #1A1A18; border: 1px solid #1A1A18; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background .2s ease-out, border-color .2s ease-out; } .ds-pill-active span { font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Paper on canvas, inside a hairline. Flat at rest; lifts on hover if interactive.
components.html:
Best breakfast picks
6 products
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ECEBE5; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(26,26,24,.04), 0 1px 3px rgba(26,26,24,.05); padding: 16px; transition: box-shadow .2s ease-out, border-color .2s ease-out; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(26,26,24,.07), 0 2px 5px rgba(26,26,24,.04); border-color: #dedcd2; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-size: 19px; color: #1A1A18; } .ds-card-meta { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #6F756E; margin-top: 4px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Paper field, hairline border; the one place green appears on a control -- transiently, as the focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; color: #1A1A18; border: 1px solid #ECEBE5; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 12px 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; outline: none; transition: border-color .2s ease-out, box-shadow .2s ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6F756E; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #2E7D52; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(46,125,82,.2); }

components.name: Explain Card (signature)
components.description: The one card in a card-less thread. Headed by the wordmark (never an avatar); no engagement controls -- you cannot vote on a fact.
components.html:
BalooExplanation

What it is. Acidity regulators control a product's pH.

In this product. It keeps a long-life oat drink stable on the shelf.

Generated by Baloo from the product label. A factual explanation, not a health claim or an opinion.
components.css: .ds-explain { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #ECEBE5; border-radius: 12px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-explain-head { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #FBFBF8; border-bottom: 1px solid #ECEBE5; padding: 10px 16px; } .ds-wordmark { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: #1A1A18; } .ds-explain-label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .13em; color: #6F756E; } .ds-explain-body { padding: 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(26,26,24,.8); } .ds-explain-body b { color: #1A1A18; } .ds-explain-note { margin-top: 12px; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid #ECEBE5; font-size: 12px; color: #6F756E; }

narrative.overview: Baloo looks like a clear, plain-language reference you already trust -- a field guide to the supermarket aisle, not a lab report and not an alarm. Near-white paper, near-black ink, structure from thin hairlines and whitespace. A warm serif (Fraunces) carries the voice; a clean sans (Inter) does the work. Deliberately restrained: exactly one place colour means anything (the green/amber Natural/Processed tags), everything else a disciplined neutral. Flat by default; shadow and motion appear only as a response to state.
keyCharacteristics: Ink on near-white paper; hairlines and whitespace over boxes and shadows.
Fraunces serif for the calm editorial voice; Inter sans for all the working UI.
One meaningful colour (green/amber = Natural/Processed), everything else neutral.
Flat at rest; motion and shadow appear only as a response to state.
No score, no rating, no traffic-light verdict -- anywhere, ever.

rules.name: The One Meaningful Colour Rule
rules.body: Green and amber appear only as the Natural/Processed ingredient tags. Every interactive state is ink-tinted neutral, never green or amber.

rules.name: The Ink-Not-Black Rule
rules.body: Text is ink (#1A1A18), never #000000. Pure black on paper is harsh and clinical.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Fraunces speaks (headings, wordmark, the AI answer); Inter works (everything you operate).

rules.name: The Hairline-First Rule
rules.body: Reach for a 1px line border before a shadow. A surface with both a heavy shadow and a border is over-built.

dos: Do structure with 1px line hairlines and whitespace first; add shadow only for hover-lift.
Do keep prose in the 640px reading column, 65-75ch.
Do set headings and the wordmark in Fraunces; set every control, label, and value in Inter.
Do keep every engagement control neutral -- ink border + ink/5% fill when active.
Do give the Natural/Processed tag a text label always, so meaning never depends on colour alone.
Do use ink (#1A1A18) for text, never #000000.
donts: Don't add a score, rating, 0-100 number, or red/amber/green traffic-light verdict anywhere.
Don't let green or amber appear outside the Natural/Processed tags.
Don't make it feel clinical or medical: no chart-grid dashboards, warning banners, or sterile health-record chrome.
Don't use alarmist 'toxic ingredient' fear language, red danger states, or scare imagery.
Don't use a border-left/right greater than 1px as a coloured accent stripe.
Don't use gradient text or decorative glassmorphism; emphasis comes from weight, size, and Fraunces.
Don't drop an ambient shadow on everything; a card with a heavy shadow and a border is over-built.
Don't stack a tiny uppercase eyebrow above every section.
